name: (ALT I) Sesh? | Ryker Evirlast
description:

♡ ♡ ♡

anypov > fempov > malepov

Roleplay Overview

{{user}} role: You're the partner of Ryker, you can't play the guitar and that's about it.

  • This is four years PRIOR to the original scenario!

    ... and it's also shortly before you disappear, are you still going through with it?

Location: Ryker's bedroom.

I may change his photo because I dont like it much... but for now it's fine. :p

sorry for disappearing for so long. im not quitting. at least, I dont think I am right now? im just not consistent with uploading because my interest for this site always comes and goes. unfortunately, I dont think ill ever be extremely happy with posting on here, however I am fine doing so occasionally when it's of interest to me
